name: Curried Meatballs
recipeIngredient: Water chestnuts - drained and chopped fine, 16 oz
recipeInstructions:
Sauce:
Sugar - 3/4 c
Soy sauce - 1/4 c
White wine vinegar - 1/2 c
Cornstarch - 2 tb
Ginger - 1/2 ts
Water - 1/2 c
Pineapple chunks - drained and chopped fine, 14 oz
Curry powder - 2 ts
Meatballs:
Combine all ingredients except cornstarch. Form into balls about 1-inch in diameter. Roll in cornstarch and refrigerate for several hours.
Sauce:
Dissolve cornstarch in water. Mix all sauce ingredients in a pan, excluding pineapple. Add pineapple juice to taste. Bring to boil, stirring constantly for 2-3 minutes. Add pineapple chunks and pour over cooked meatballs. Serve hot in serving dish with toothpicks.
